signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved in April 2026, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's ~10% weekly price gain to $1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1][6].

RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout on XRP Ledger and Ethereum | YES | MED confidence**  
Official launch confirmed as of April 19, 2026, boosting XRPL transaction volume and institutional adoption, with XRP ETF approvals in final stages[2].  
No other breaking confirmations (e.g., ETF approval or IPO) reported as fully resolved right now[1][2][3].

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg's **rookie season with the Dallas Mavericks has ended**, highlighted by a win tying them for 7th/8th in the
signals.raw: Cooper Flagg's **rookie season with the Dallas Mavericks has ended**, highlighted by a win tying them for 7th/8th in the West (with ~9% draft lottery odds) and an ankle sprain in his final game; the team is now conducting exit interviews.[1]
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?

signals.headline: Cavaliers lost 130-120 at home to Mavericks (Flagg's breakout game), exposing defensive issues amid a tight playoff race
signals.raw: Cavaliers lost 130-120 at home to Mavericks (Flagg's breakout game), exposing defensive issues amid a tight playoff race; they're 41-26 as East's 4th seed per prior reports.[2][3]
